summary: Frontend testing of Act I detailed protocol logic and Dashboard 3D visual upgrades. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Login works with test@demo.com / password123
Dashboard loads with 4 act cards in correct order (Earth, Fire, Water, Air)
Dashboard canvas element renders (1710x1032) with floating particles in 4 element colors
Dashboard 3D cards have hover effects with element-colored glowing borders
Dashboard glass-morphism panels have backdrop-filter blur (6px and 8px)
Dashboard action strip buttons (Begin Protocol Session, Unlock Full System, Meet The Seeker) working
Dashboard Seeker Echo panel displays correctly
Dashboard roadmap section displays correctly
Act I protocol page (/protocol/1) loads with Earth/Fractured Veil content
Act I header shows 'ACT I · EARTH · THE FRACTURED VEIL'
Act I principle shows 'Awareness. Recognition. Naming what was hidden beneath the surface.'
Act I 5 steps render correctly: Recognize, Name, Excavate, Witness, Declare
Act I Step 1: Domain sliders with 'Ground Survey — Stability Calibration' label
Act I Step 1: Fracture Index metric with contextual metricReadings
Act I Step 1: Deepest Crack metric with earth-themed domainReadings
Act I Step 1: Slider ends show 'Stable' to 'Fracturing'
Act I Step 2: Checklist with 'Pattern Audit — Recurring Architecture' label
Act I Step 2: Pattern Score metric (0/7)
Act I Step 2: Pattern Reading with burnVerdicts-style verdicts
Act I Step 3: Pills with 'Source Map — Origin Inventory' label
Act I Step 3: Source Systems metric with ledgerReadings
Act I Step 3: Primary Source with ledgerPriority ordering
Act I Step 4: Witness sliders with 'Witness Test — Awareness Calibration' label
Act I Step 4: Witness Score metric (15/30)
Act I Step 4: Gap Reading with witnessGaps readings
Act I Step 5: Declaration with 'Declaration Index — Gap Analysis' label
Act I Step 5: Declaration Gap metric with declReadings
Act I Step 5: Protocol Status with declStatuses
Act I Terra agent displayed in agent panel with correct name
Act I Transmit button shows 'Transmit to Terra'
Act I step navigation (5 pips) works correctly
Act I Complete Protocol button appears on Step 5
critical_code_review_comments: actDefinitions.js Act I now has full detailed definitions matching Act II structure (metricReadings, domainReadings, burnVerdicts, ledgerPriority, ledgerReadings, witnessGaps, declReadings, declStatuses)
Dashboard.js AmbientBackground component correctly renders canvas with 40 floating particles in 4 element colors
Dashboard.js ActCard3D component correctly implements 3D transforms (perspective, rotateX/Y) on mouse move with glowing box-shadow
Dashboard.js glass-morphism panels use backdrop-filter: blur() for semi-transparent effect
ActProtocol.js correctly renders all exercise types with contextual metrics from actDefinitions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Act I Earth/Fractured Veil now has full detailed protocol logic matching Act II Fire structure. All 5 steps have: Step 1 (domain_sliders with metricReadings, domainReadings), Step 2 (checklist with burnVerdicts), Step 3 (pills with ledgerPriority, ledgerReadings), Step 4 (witness_sliders with witnessGaps), Step 5 (declaration with declReadings, declStatuses). Dashboard has 3D cards with AmbientBackground canvas (floating particles), ActCard3D with 3D transforms and glow effects, glass-morphism panels with backdrop-filter blur.

notes.act1_detailed_logic: All 5 steps have earth-themed content with Terra agent
notes.dashboard_3d_cards: ActCard3D uses CSS 3D transforms (perspective, rotateX/Y) on mouse move
notes.ambient_background: Canvas with 40 floating particles in green/red/blue/gold colors
notes.glass_morphism: Panels use backdrop-filter: blur(6px/8px) for semi-transparent effect
